document_summary: This exhibit presents an introduction to TikTok, another winner of the 2019 Data Awards (Best Data-Driven Growth Award in the enterprise category). TikTok is described as the leading destination for short-form mobile video with global offices across major cities worldwide. This demonstrates the caliber of fellow Data Awards winners -- a globally dominant technology company.

snippets.text: TikTok is the leading destination for short- form mobile video. Our mission is to inspire creativity and bring joy.
snippets.subject: TikTok
snippets.reasoning: TikTok's self-description as the leading destination for short-form mobile video establishes its market dominance and validates the prestige of the Data Awards which selected it as a winner alongside Liu.

snippets.text: TikTok has global offices including Los Angeles, New York, London, Paris, Berlin, Dubai, Mumbai, Singapore, Jakarta, Seoul, and Tokyo.
snippets.subject: TikTok
snippets.reasoning: TikTok's global presence across 11 major cities worldwide demonstrates its scale as a fellow Data Awards winner, supporting the award's prestige.

entities.name: TikTok
entities.identity: Leading global short-form mobile video platform; winner of the Data Awards Best Data-Driven Growth Award 2019
